turns.user_input: what patients have I seen today?
turns.final_reply:
I can help you retrieve your patient list. I can query the list of patients you've seen on any date.

To make the most of this information, could you please provide:
1. The date you're interested in (in YYYY-MM-DD format)
2. Whether you specifically want the "all" shift list or just for a certain day

Please let me know which option you prefer, and I'll generate the patient list for you.
